user.title: Connect to Unsplash
user.description:
Enter your Unsplash **Access Key**.

Create one for free at {url} (Register → New Application). Use the Access Key, not the Secret Key.

error.rate_limit: Unsplash returned a rate-limit error. Wait an hour and try again, or upgrade your Unsplash application to production tier.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Unsplash API. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: An Unsplash integration is already configured with this access key.

add_collection.title: Add an Unsplash collection
add_collection.description:
Enter a public Unsplash Collection ID. The ID is the number at the end of the collection URL — for example, `8975107` from `https://unsplash.com/collections/8975107`.

Leave the display name blank to use the collection's title from Unsplash.

settings.title: Refresh settings
settings.description: How often each collection's image entity should swap to a new random photo. Minimum 60 seconds — be mindful of your Unsplash rate limit (50/hour on demo apps, 5000/hour on approved production apps).

error.invalid_auth: Unsplash rejected the access key. The key may have been revoked — reconfigure the integration.
error.collection_not_found: That collection couldn't be found. Make sure the ID is correct and the collection is public.

abort.no_collections: No collections are configured yet. Use 'Add a collection' from the main options menu.
